features: GENTLE FOR DAILY USE: Its kind, water-based formula is a gentle lubricant for a natural, comfortable feel
WATER BASED LUBE: Knect is a water-based lubricant, similar to your body's natural wetness, helping to alleviate vaginal dryness and ensure comfort during sex
FRAGRANCE FREE: Enjoy peace of mind with a lube that leaves no stains and is free from fragrance
COMPATIBLE WITH CONDOMS: Safe for use with latex and polyisoprene condoms, enhancing pleasure without compromising protection
EASY TO RINSE OFF: Knect’s non-staining formula allows for effortless clean up
description: Product Description Knect Lubricant Jelly is quickly prepares you for intimacy and eases the discomfort of vaginal dryness during sex. Its kind, water-based formula is a gentle lubricant for a natural, comfortable feel. It is doctor recommended, most trusted lubricant brand and fragrance free, non-greasy. It is gentle and safe, compatible with latex condoms only and thoroughly tested and safe to use. It provides personal lubrication to comfort dry intimate areas. Knect provides the comfort and natural feeling that allows you and your partner to enjoy comfortable sex on an ongoing basis. Indications Knect heightens sexual pleasure by complementing personal moisture to help ensure lubrication and comfort during sex Ingredients Purified water, Propylene Glycol, Sorbitol, Hydroxyethylcellulose, Benzoic Acid, Polysorbate 60, Tocopheryl Acetate. Directions 1. Close after use 2. Compatible with latex condoms. 3. Prevent eye exposure Safety Warning Prevent eye exposure. May cause skin irritation. For external use only.
